feed.title: althor · Writing
feed.subtitle: Working notes from shipping agent systems into regulated environments.

entry.title: Adding MCP servers to Copilot Studio in regulated environments
entry.summary: Five architecture decisions the Copilot Studio MCP onboarding wizard quietly assumes you've already made — identity, DLP zone, generative orchestration, Streamable transport, tenant scoping.

entry.title: Drawing the right boundaries for an MCP server
entry.summary: Six rules that keep MCP tool surfaces narrow enough to defend without making them too narrow to use.

entry.title: Making agent deployments pass security review
entry.summary: A five-layer architecture for shipping agent systems into regulated environments — identity, credential broker, scoped tools, policy gating, audit.
